title: Clavicular suddenly ends livestream leaving fans worried as illness revealed amid ongoing investigation rumors and growing past controversies
summary_full: Braden Eric Peters, known as Clavicular, ended his livestream early due to illness, not legal trouble. Fans had feared something serious because of his past controversies. Sources confirmed he had flu-like symptoms. While he faces ongoing legal and public scrutiny, there is no official update linking the livestream incident to any investigation or enforcement action at this time.
